Audit only; do not edit files.
Use package.json, README.md, AGENTS.md if present, CLAUDE.md, docs/agent, .claude, index/free-assets, css/js, and verify-frozen.js.
Prefer current code and tests over old prose.
Return concise facts that instructions, skills, hooks, and future agents must preserve.
